Installs ARM cross-compilation tools and QEMU user static for ARM emulation on Linux.

# Purpose
This script is a Bash executable file intended for setting up a development environment. It updates the package list on a Debian-based system and installs specific packages necessary for cross-compiling ARM applications. The packages include `gcc-arm-linux-gnueabihf` for the ARM cross-compiler, `libc6-dev-armhf-cross` for ARM development libraries, and `qemu-user-static` for emulating ARM binaries. The script uses `sudo` to ensure that the commands have the necessary permissions to modify the system.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `gcc-arm-linux-gnueabihf`
- `libc6-dev-armhf-cross`
- `qemu-user-static`
